response.justification: The candidate clears the 15-year experience minimum with a broad, hands-on engineering career spanning web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus entrepreneurial experience as an open-source platform founder and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks). However, the trajectory is senior/staff IC rather than principal/director level, and there is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products at scale, cloud platform strategy work, or advising strategic customers — the core of this role.
strengths: 19+ years of hands-on engineering across diverse stacks and domains
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform
Recent practical work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated director-level scope or engineering leadership at scale
Lacks recognized AI expertise or notable AI-powered products/platforms
No evidence of strategic advisory or cloud product strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Meets tenure minimum with entrepreneurial and emerging AI-tooling experience
